response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong general software engineering fundamentals and exceptional mentoring/craftsmanship practices, he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. His C++ expertise is severely outdated (most recent substantial C++ work was 2014-2015, 11 years ago), his career has evolved toward web/full-stack development rather than systems-level work, and critically, he has no demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443, SDL) or industrial automation domain knowledge. This represents a significant backward career step rather than a lateral transition.
strengths: 19+ years of software engineering experience with proven track record building scalable, event-driven systems and strong architectural thinking across multiple domains
Exceptional mentoring and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, code kata leadership) with clear emphasis on code quality, testing rigor, and knowledge sharing
Full-stack technical versatility across multiple languages (Node.js, React, TypeScript, DLang) demonstrating ability to learn new technologies and adapt to different problem domains
concerns: C++ expertise severely outdated; last significant C++ role was December 2014 (11 years ago); recent 10 years focused on JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not modern C++ systems programming
Complete absence of industrial cybersecurity experience (IEC 62443, SDL practices, secure development lifecycle) which is explicitly required for this security-critical manufacturing role

Career trajectory is web/SaaS/fintech-focused rather than industrial automation; no demonstrated experience with IoT, embedded systems, industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or manufacturing domain
